---
title: "Simulation"
---

```{r}
#| warning: FALSE
#| echo: FALSE
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| out-width: "100%"

library(ggplot2)

cbb <- read.csv("cbb.csv")
contenders <- subset(cbb, POSTSEASON %in% c("2ND", "F4", "Champions"))
n <- nrow(contenders)
L <- min(contenders$ADJDE)
β <- mean(contenders$ADJDE)-min(contenders$ADJDE)
pdf.threshold <- L+β*log(n)

x.sequence <- seq(L+0.01, 200, length.out=500)
f.x <- (n/β)*exp(-(x.sequence-L)/β)*(1-exp(-(x.sequence-L)/β))^(n-1)
pdf.df <- data.frame(x=x.sequence, fx=f.x)

set.seed(42)
sim.maximum <- replicate(10000, {
  draws <- L+rexp(n, rate=1/β)
  max(draws)
})
sim.df <- data.frame(max_adjde=sim.maximum)

sim.plot <- ggplot(sim.df, aes(x=max_adjde))+
  geom_histogram(aes(y=after_stat(density), fill="Simulated Data"),
                 bins=60,
                 color="white",
                 alpha=0.7)+
  geom_line(data=pdf.df,
            aes(x=x, y=f.x, color="Theoretical Dist."),
            inherit.aes=FALSE)+
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=pdf.threshold, color="Threshold Shift"),
             linetype="dashed",
             linewidth=0.5)+
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=122.2, color="Observed Mean Shift"),
             linetype="dashed",
             linewidth=0.5)+
  scale_fill_manual(name=NULL, values=c("Simulated Data"="lightblue"))+
  scale_color_manual(name=NULL, values=c("Theoretical Dist."="maroon", 
                                         "Threshold Shift"="black", 
                                         "Observed Mean Shift"="red"))+
  labs(title="Simulated vs Theoretical Distribution of Maximum ADR",
       x="Maximum Adjusted Defensive Rating",
       y="Density")
sim.plot

```
## Simulation Results

To validate the theoretical model, 10,000 samples of size $n = 48$ were drawn from a shifted exponential distribution with shift $L = 84.0$ and scale $\hat{\beta} = 8.6$, and the maximum of each sample was recorded.

The theoretical threshold (mode of the maximum's distribution) was found to be $L + \hat{\beta}\ln(n) = 117.1$, meaning that a team with an adjusted defensive rating at or below **117.1** can be considered a realistic national championship contender. The simulated mean and median of the maximum were **122.2** and **120.3**, respectively, with a standard deviation of **10.9**.
